ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the area belongs to */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source the table belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the data table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data table was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tables_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rows" (
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data table the row belongs to */,
  "row_name" TEXT /* Name of the row */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the row */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the row was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the row was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data table the column belongs to */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the column */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type the column belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the column was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the column was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data table the value belongs to */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the row the value belongs to */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the column the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Actual value within the cell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES data_tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES rows ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was assigned the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data table being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES data_tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data table the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES data_tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change belongs to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
